rationale: No new escalation near Romania's borders; Xi-Kim meeting and US-Iran deal are background geopolitical signals with no immediate regional impact on Romanian daily life.

top_events.title: Trump says US and Iran reached a 'great settlement'
top_events.summary: A potential de-escalation in the Middle East could ease oil prices, providing modest relief to Romanian energy costs.

top_events.title: Xi Jinping visits Pyongyang to revitalise China-North Korea ties
top_events.summary: Strengthening of the China-Russia-North Korea axis is a background security concern for NATO's eastern flank, including Romania.

top_events.title: El Niño confirmed active, threatens weather extremes
top_events.summary: Could affect Black Sea region agricultural output and energy demand; indirect and diffuse impact on Romania.
